name: SEO & Content
description: Your SEO & Content lead. Site audits, keyword research, blog drafts, case studies, content repurposing, content-gap analysis, backlinks, and AI-search (GEO) visibility for the solo-founder inbound engine.
author: Houston Founder Marketing

agentSeeds..houston/activity.json: [{"id":"b82f93e4-304c-4055-8899-453caaeca4e5","title":"Onboard me — 3 quick questions (~90s)","description":"Click this card, then send any message to kick off onboarding. I'll ask three things: your domain, your existing content (connected CMS or top post URLs), and which SEO tooling you've connected via Composio. Best modality per topic: connected app via Composio (Integrations tab) > file/URL > paste.","status":"needs_you"}]

useCases.title: Run a full SEO audit of your site
useCases.prompt: Run an SEO audit of my site with Semrush.
useCases.description: On-page + technical audit via Semrush (or Ahrefs / Firecrawl fallback). I rank issues by impact × ease and give you a fix list — not a wall of warnings.
useCases.outcome: Scored audit at seo-audits/{domain}-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md — 10 prioritized fixes you can ship this week.

useCases.title: Check visibility in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini
useCases.prompt: How does my product show up in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini? Run a GEO audit.
useCases.description: Probe AI search engines for brand and category terms. Recommend Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) changes — schema, mentions, source authority — to rank in AI answers.
useCases.outcome: AI-search audit at ai-search-audits/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md with concrete content + schema changes.

useCases.title: Build the keyword map you can actually own
useCases.prompt: Run keyword research with Semrush for {topic} — give me the clusters worth owning.
useCases.description: Cluster keywords by intent and difficulty via Semrush (or Ahrefs). Flag the 3 pillars worth owning. Draft cluster briefs. No vanity keyword dumps.
useCases.outcome: A living keyword-map.md at my root + per-cluster briefs at keyword-clusters/{slug}.md.

useCases.title: Find your content gap vs a competitor
useCases.prompt: Where's our content gap vs {competitor}? Rank the gaps we should close first.
useCases.description: Crawl their content via Firecrawl, compare against ours, rank gaps by search volume × how easily we could take the topic.
useCases.outcome: Ranked list at content-gap-analyses/{competitor}-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md with a first-draft brief per gap.

useCases.title: Draft a full SEO-targeted blog post
useCases.prompt: Draft a blog post on {topic} targeting {keyword} and save it to Google Docs.
useCases.description: 2,000–3,000 words with proper H1/H2/H3, meta description, URL slug, internal-link suggestions, and one clear CTA. Save to Google Docs if connected.
useCases.outcome: Draft at blog-posts/{slug}.md + a Google Doc if connected.

useCases.title: Turn a happy customer into a case study
useCases.prompt: Draft a case study for {customer} from my Airtable interview notes.
useCases.description: Pull the interview, email thread, or testimonial from Airtable (or paste). Structure as challenge → approach → results — with real numbers, not marketer-speak.
useCases.outcome: Case study at case-studies/{customer-slug}.md ready for sales and your website.

useCases.title: Turn one blog post into 5 LinkedIn posts
useCases.prompt: Turn {blog post URL} into 5 LinkedIn posts.
useCases.description: Extract the core ideas via Firecrawl and reshape each into a LinkedIn-native post (hook, whitespace, one clear takeaway) your Social agent can pick up and ship.
useCases.outcome: 5 post drafts at repurposed/{source-slug}-to-linkedin.md — hand to Social & Community.

useCases.title: Turn a YouTube video into a blog draft
useCases.prompt: Turn {YouTube URL} into a blog post draft.
useCases.description: Fetch the transcript via YouTube. Rewrite as a long-form blog draft with SEO structure. Great for conference talks, founder interviews, live sessions.

useCases.title: Find backlink targets and draft the pitches
useCases.prompt: Find backlink targets with Ahrefs and draft per-site pitches.
useCases.description: Identify target sites via SERP + Ahrefs backlink tool that match your niche. Draft per-target pitch emails grounded in what you actually offer them.
useCases.outcome: Backlink plan at backlink-plans/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md with outreach email drafts per target.
